GWAS Summary — MAF 0.10 / geno 0.2

Pararge aegeria — 94 samples (47 NN × 47 DD) — Generated 2026-03-07

Filter Settings

MAF threshold0.10 (stricter than default 0.05)
Genotype missingness0.20 (more lenient than default 0.10)
HWE filterNone (removed to retain focal locus)
Sample missingness0.10 (unchanged)
PCA covariates10 PCs from HWE-filtered set (standard)

Commands Executed

Step 1 — Variant QC (MAF 0.10, geno 0.2, no HWE)
plink2 --bfile results/plink/variants \
    --maf 0.10 \
    --geno 0.2 \
    --make-bed \
    --out results/plink/variants_qc_maf01geno02 \
    --chr-set 27 --allow-extra-chr
Step 2 — Sample QC
plink2 --bfile results/plink/variants_qc_maf01geno02 \
    --mind 0.1 \
    --make-bed \
    --out results/plink/variants_qc_samples_maf01geno02 \
    --chr-set 27 --allow-extra-chr
Step 3 — GWAS association
plink2 --bfile results/plink/variants_qc_samples_maf01geno02 \
    --pheno results/gwas_maf0.1geno0.2/phenotypes.txt \
    --covar results/pca/pca.eigenvec \
    --covar-col-nums 3-12 \
    --glm firth-fallback hide-covar \
    --out results/gwas_maf0.1geno0.2/association_results \
    --chr-set 27 --allow-extra-chr
Step 4 — Plotting
Rscript scripts/plot_gwas_results.R \
    results/gwas_maf0.1geno0.2/association_results.PHENO1.glm.logistic.hybrid \
    results/pca/pca.eigenvec results/pca/pca.eigenval \
    results/plots_maf0.1geno0.2/manhattan_plot.pdf \
    results/plots_maf0.1geno0.2/qq_plot.pdf \
    results/plots_maf0.1geno0.2/pca_plot.pdf

Identical top 10 to the noHWE run. The stricter MAF (0.10) removed ~693k rare variants but the chr 3 signal (MAF > 0.10) was unaffected. The more lenient genotype missingness (0.20) did not introduce new top hits.
